story.title: What Trump and Xi want from China visit
story.summary: Tensions over trade, technology, Taiwan, and the war on Iran are set to dominate high-stakes talks between Trump and Xi.
story.selection_reason: The meeting between Trump and Xi has the potential to impact global trade, technology, and geopolitical relationships, making it the most globally significant story.
